## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening

## Security/Privacy Impact

- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security-sensitive logic changed
- [ ] Privacy/data-flow changed

If checked, explain risk and mitigation:

## Backward Compatibility

- [ ] No migration needed
- [ ] Backward compatible
- [ ] Breaking change (describe)

## Testing Done

- [ ] `dart analyze`
- [ ] Relevant runtime/manual tests
- [ ] `bash scripts/check_no_secrets.sh`
- [ ] Encryption/pairing flow checked (if affected)

## Documentation

- [ ] No docs update needed
- [ ] Docs updated in `docs/`
- [ ] README links updated (if needed)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Release/signing config unchanged or intentionally updated
- [ ] I reviewed changed files for security-sensitive regressions
